title: huggingface/speech-to-speech
friendlyTitle: Hugging Face has a toolkit for local voice agents
summary: Hugging Face’s speech-to-speech repo provides tools for building local voice agents with open-source models. Recent activity includes a realtime web demo app that speaks an OpenAI Realtime-style WebSocket protocol.
friendlySummary: This project helps developers build AI voice agents using open-source models on local systems.
whyItMatters: The repo gives builders a practical starting point for experimenting with local voice agents rather than depending only on hosted voice APIs. It is relevant for assistants, accessibility tools, call workflows, and private voice interfaces.
friendlyWhyItMatters: It is useful if you want to test voice AI without sending every voice interaction to a hosted service.
